package.name: ira_laser_tools
package.description: ROS2 (ament) laser tools: laserscan_multi_merger (merge several LaserScan topics into one PointCloud2 + LaserScan) and laserscan_virtualizer (project a PointCloud2 into virtual LaserScans per frame). Dependency-free port (tf2 + sensor_msgs PointCloud2 iterators; no laser_geometry/PCL/dynamic_reconfigure).
